title: Bridge Essay: Erratum in: Effects of Tummo Meditation and Niguma Yoga on Brain Activity.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Erratum, in:, Effects, of, Tummo.

**Erratum in: Effects of Tummo Meditation and Niguma Yoga on Brain Activity.** — Hawaii J Health Soc Welf. PMID: 41567364. DOI: 10.62547/PTJZ8938. [This corrects the article on p. 195 in vol. 84, PMID: 41356177.].
